narrative: Iran strikes on the UAE drive a geopolitical risk premium as oil surges toward $105 — USD/JPY firms to 157.21, supported by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; gold lower -2.48% near $4,500 as war fears tarnish metals; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.32%; VIX 18.3. EUR/USD slides to 1.1695 as a 175bp Fed-ECB differential and hawkish Fed commentary anchor the dollar bid. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC tomorrow.
